info.name: FactSet Virtual Portfolio API for Digital Portals
Portfolio
Create a portfolio.

items.docs:
Create a portfolio.

Certain error conditions yield errors as follows: 

|Error Condition|HTTP Error|
|-------|--------|
|The number of portfolios would exceed 100.|400 Bad Request|

info.name: Delete a portfolio.

items.docs: Delete a portfolio.

info.name: Details of a portfolio.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: Details of a portfolio.

info.name: List of portfolios with keyfigures.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _sort
params.description: Sortable attributes. The sort order is ascending unless it is prefixed with a minus sign, in which case it is descending. A list of at most 2 (possibly prefixed) attribute name(s) is allowed.

items.docs: List of portfolios with keyfigures.

info.name: Modify a portfolio.

items.docs: Modify a portfolio.

info.name: Evaluate a portfolio.

items.docs: Performs an evaluation over a period of time and returns portfolio key figures for each day, week, or month.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _sort
params.description: Sortable attributes. The sort order is ascending unless it is prefixed with a minus sign, in which case it is descending. A list of at most 2 (possibly prefixed) attribute name(s) is allowed.

items.docs: List of portfolios.

info.name: Modify a payout in a portfolio.

items.docs:
Modify a payout in a portfolio.

Certain error conditions yield errors as follows: 

|Error Condition|HTTP Error|
|-------|--------|
|At least one of the parameters `notation`, `type`, `amount`, `transaction` or `time` must be set.|400 Bad Request|
|Invalid payout identifier.|400 Bad Request|

info.name: List all open positions of a portfolio.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _sort
params.description: Sortable attributes. The sort order is ascending unless it is prefixed with a minus sign, in which case it is descending. A list of at most 10 (possibly prefixed) attribute name(s) is allowed.

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip, or 0 (default).

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return.

items.docs: List all open positions of a portfolio.

items.docs: List all closed positions of a portfolio.

params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return.

info.name: Positions

Certain error conditions yield errors as follows: 

|Error Condition|HTTP Error|
|-------|--------|
|Maximum number of watchlist positions would exceed 100.|400 Bad Request|
|The watchlist does not exist.|400 Bad Request|
|The notation already exists in the watchlist.|400 Bad Request|
